calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Angie Diner, 581.

Marsha Kerr, Esq. appeared by Court Call for plaintiff JP Morgan Chase Bank, N.A., was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant William C. Jones aka William s. Jones sr aka William C. Jones Sr aka Skeeter A. Jones aka Skeeter Jones Sr., ind and dba Clearheart as follows:

Damages - $100,224.21
Prejudgment Interest - $5,676.68
Attorney Fees - $1,250.00
Costs - $484.90, for a total judgment in the amount of $107,635.79

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
